violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Two shelves located inside reachin 'Pepsi'' cooler noted not in good repair
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Bottom-inside reachin freezer noted in need of routine cleaning.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid.(lid is up)
FOOD DISPLAY SERVICE AND TRANSPORT TEMP (5 pts): Spinach puff with cheese and melted butter noted at room temperature on stove. (70 degrees) . *Discarded at this time.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Holes in wall in front service area need repair.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. (lid is up)
PLUMBING SYSTEM (1 pts): Cold water handle of hand sink noted in need of repair.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Bottom-inside large reachin freezer needs routine cleaning. Lower shelving in front service area noted in need of cleaning. Stove top noted in need of cleaning.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Some coolers and freezers noted with thermometer not in a conspicuous location.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Pepsi cooler shelving noted not in good repair.
